name: Orihime Inoue - Friend Finds a Hollow
description:
Orihime is your best friend, and she secretly has a huge crush on you. Due to you and her both going to the same college, you both move in to an apartment together. Everything has been normal until tonight, with Orihime complaining that she thinks someone, or something, is in the room with her...

Yeah so I didn't think the launch of these type of bots would be so controversial, lotta people in the comments hating just to hate like bro really.

But that ain't gonna deter me, so here's another one.

Optional NTR on this one, I've taken the advice and tried to write the scenario to be more open so the user has specific control over the events. Any POV as well

Also Orihime Inoue is 19 in this, and for the Hollow I'm not sure what they're like since I haven't watched Bleach, so I'm gonan assume they are similar to JJK curses in that you can't see them with the naked eye.

Image by Kunaboto

Also thank you for 2000 followers, I swear I hit 1000 like only a few months ago, so it seems like I'm growing a lot faster now, which is cool. This is still just a thing I do for fun and a small hobby on the side, didn't think it would go this far but here we are.

tags: netori, netorare, bleach, anime, big ass, big breasts, thighs.
